ops.body:
Phase 3 discovery complete (read-only, zero probe errors): 161 active repos → **44 consumers** of guides.yml, all with latest run green, zero stragglers in either direction (no lock-without-workflow, no workflow-without-lock).

Divergence is uniform, not bespoke: 9 repos byte-match the canonical stub; the other 35 differ ONLY by the missing `secrets: inherit` line (pre-36108d02 stub vintage) — verified mechanically for all 35. Under the new design this is moot: the sweep replaces every consumer's guides.yml wholesale with the @main shim, so **all 44 qualify for mechanical replacement, no bespoke review needed**.

Two sweep exclusions: **cc-guides** (its guides.yml becomes the dual-mode brain itself, landed in Phase 1 — must NOT get the shim) and **cc-skills** (Phase 2 canary handles it first). Sweep list = the remaining 42.

Exact-match 9: captain-hook, cc-orchestrate, cc-review, cc-squash, cc-steer, cc-transcript, docker-dsl, experiment-at-home, spawnllm. Divergent 35: authkit, cc-context, cc-factory, cc-guides, cc-interact, cc-merge, cc-notes, cc-pane, cc-pool, cc-present, cc-runtime, cc-sentiment, cc-sentiments-experiments, cc-skills, cc-sudo, cc-vigil, cookiesync, crm, daemonkit, dailies, ego, fly-me-to-the-moon, fusekit, getaway, reposync, rescue-chai, room-scan, semisweet, slop-cop, stream-trade, synckit, synonym-to-clicky-for-things-that-that-need-to-be-done, write-like-me, yasyf.com, yclaw.

Enumeration caveat: `gh repo list yasyf --no-archived --source` excludes the 70 forks; no archived repos exist. Script/raw data: /tmp/guides-discovery.py, /tmp/guides-discovery-out.json (ephemeral).
